sentences.text: Hello. Thank you for calling Bridge housing. If you know, your party's extension you may dial it at any time. If this is a service emergency regarding a Bridge property, please press one or you may call one eight eight eight three seven two three four nine zero that number once again one eight eight eight three seven two three four nine zero if you're seeking housing please press two or visit us on the web at W W W dot Bridge housing dot. Com or call four one five two six seven seven six seven three that number once again, four one five two six seven seven six seven three for our company dial by name directory please press three. Welcome to the directory please enter the first three letters of your party's first or last name using your touchtone key pad use the seven key for Q and the nine key for Z. There are no more compatible entries in the directory welcome to the directory please enter the first three letters of your party's first or last name using your touchtone key pad use the seven key for Q and the nine key for Z. Press one for M I R I a M S T E L L. Thank you for calling Burns housing. This is Maryanne to us. I am currently unavailable.

conversation.title: Call: Dan Cellon and Maiesha Anthony @ BRIDGE Housing Corporation
